overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City at dusk. The player moves from under a neon-lit overpass along a busy street with futuristic vehicles, passing large holographic billboards and transitioning from an enclosed urban canyon to an open coastal road with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with neon advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, observing the neon billboards and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying NCOLA advertisement with white background
illuminated sign for Delamain corporation mounted on the overpass structure
massive concrete highway overpass creating a covered tunnel effect with geometric supports
tall dark building with angular geometric facade and minimal windows
modern street lamp with horizontal light fixture lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive highway overpass in a futuristic city, with the camera walking forward along a concrete sidewalk. Large corporate billboards for NCOLA and Delamain dominate the view ahead, while futuristic vehicles drive on the multi-lane street to the right. The lighting is a mix of artificial neon and fading natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open with large overhead holographic billboard

events.description: large 3MOUTHS 1 DESIRE holographic billboard comes into view overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward under the overpass, approaching the exit with increasing natural light visible ahead

entered.detail: massive curved holographic billboard displaying 3MOUTHS 1 DESIRE advertisement with pink and red graphics
green neon sign reading softsys on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper under the overpass, the scene is dominated by a massive curved holographic billboard advertising 3MOUTHS 1 DESIRE overhead. The environment remains sheltered but light increases ahead indicating the exit. A green neon softsys sign appears on the left building as the camera progresses forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban coastal street with palm trees and large digital billboards

events.description: exits covered overpass into open air with visible dusk sky and distant palm trees

agents.ego_description: emerging from the overpass into the open air, continuing along the sidewalk with the coastal area visible ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with headlights on driving along the street

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying EL GUAPO with a skull graphic on a building facade
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dusk sky in the distance
clear dusk sky visible overhead transitioning from blue to darker tones

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the overpass into open air, revealing a wide urban street at dusk. The EL GUAPO billboard becomes prominent on the right, while palm trees become visible in the distance against the evening sky. The lighting shifts from artificial to natural dusk, and futuristic vehicles continue to pass on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal city street approaching open plaza with palm tree lining

events.description: slight rightward curve in path as sidewalk follows the coastal road toward the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking along the open coastal sidewalk with palm trees lining the right side, approaching a plaza area

entered.detail: open plaza area with buildings and palm trees visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along an open coastal street with the EL GUAPO billboard receding into the distance. Palm trees line the right side of the street, now closer and more prominent. The path curves slightly toward an open plaza area ahead, with the sky transitioning to deeper twilight tones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the sheltered, neon-lit depths of a futuristic urban underpass into the open air of a coastal twilight street. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive highway overpass, passing corporate billboards for NCOLA and Delamain while futuristic vehicles stream by on the adjacent road. As the camera moves deeper into the shadows, a massive curved holographic advertisement for 3MOUTHS 1 DESIRE looms overhead before the path opens up toward a bright exit marked by a green neon softsys sign. The scene then expands into the open air of a wide street at dusk, where the lighting shifts from artificial neon to natural evening tones as an EL GUAPO billboard and distant palm trees emerge. Finally, the camera continues along the coastal road, leaving the urban canyon behind as the palm trees become more prominent and the path curves toward an open plaza under a deepening twilight sky.
